Bash(echo "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\); from scripts.build_caption_index import extract_image_id, load_caption_map; tests = [\('COCO_train2014_000000000036.jpg', \(36, 'COCO-CN'\)\), \('COCO_val2014_000000000042.jpg', \(42, 'COCO-CN'\)\), \('Flickr30K_985982384.jpg', \(985982384, 'Flickr30k-CN'\)\), \('MUGE_100.jpg', \(100, 'MUGE'\)\), \('MUGE_1000002.jpg', \(1000002, 'MUGE'\)\)]; all_pass = all\(extract_image_id\(f\) == e for f, e in tests\); print\('ID extraction tests:', 'PASS' if all_pass else 'FAIL'\); cmap = load_caption_map\('E:/Chinese-Clip-datasets', ['MUGE']\); print\(f'MUGE captions: {len\(cmap\):,}'\); cmap2 = load_caption_map\('E:/Chinese-Clip-datasets', ['COCO-CN', 'Flickr30k-CN']\); print\(f'Auto captions: {len\(cmap2\):,}'\); coco = sum\(1 for v in cmap2.values\(\) if v[1]=='COCO-CN'\); fk = sum\(1 for v in cmap2.values\(\) if v[1]=='Flickr30k-CN'\); print\(f'COCO-CN: {coco:,}, Flickr30k-CN: {fk:,}'\)")

Bash("D:/miniconda3/envs/pt_env/python.exe" -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\); from scripts.build_caption_index import extract_image_id, load_caption_map; tests = [\('COCO_train2014_000000000036.jpg', \(36, 'COCO-CN'\)\), \('Flickr30K_985982384.jpg', \(985982384, 'Flickr30k-CN'\)\), \('MUGE_100.jpg', \(100, 'MUGE'\)\)]; all_pass = all\(extract_image_id\(f\) == e for f, e in tests\); print\('ID extraction: ' + \('PASS' if all_pass else 'FAIL'\)\); cmap = load_caption_map\('E:/Chinese-Clip-datasets', ['MUGE']\); print\('MUGE captions: ' + str\(len\(cmap\)\)\); cmap2 = load_caption_map\('E:/Chinese-Clip-datasets', ['COCO-CN', 'Flickr30k-CN']\); print\('Auto captions: ' + str\(len\(cmap2\)\)\); coco = sum\(1 for v in cmap2.values\(\) if v[1]=='COCO-CN'\); fk = sum\(1 for v in cmap2.values\(\) if v[1]=='Flickr30k-CN'\); print\('COCO-CN: ' + str\(coco\) + ', Flickr30k-CN: ' + str\(fk\)\)")
